data.content: Implementation review rejected. Requirement: selected agent should appear in the terminal Claimed and TAKE log lines. The code path in src/lib/terminal-manager.ts appears to add [agent: <label>] to both lines, and the test file includes assertions for that behavior, but the required sanity gate does not pass: bun test src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts fails 4 tests because the suite uses vi.waitFor, which is undefined in this Bun/Vitest environment. This leaves the automated verification incomplete, so the knot must return to ready_for_implementation until the test harness is repaired and the targeted sanity check passes.
